tEn: Fire-Flyer AI-HPC: A Cost-Effective Software-Hardware Co-Design for Deep Learning
tZh: Fire-Flyer AI-HPC：一种经济高效的深度学习软硬件协同设计
sEn: Fire-Flyer AI-HPC achieves DGX-A100-like performance at half the cost and 40% less energy using 10,000 PCIe A100 GPUs.
sZh: Fire-Flyer AI-HPC 使用一万块 PCIe A100 GPU，实现了接近 DGX-A100 的性能，同时成本减半、能耗降低 40%。
absEn: The rapid progress in Deep Learning (DL) and Large Language Models (LLMs) has exponentially increased demands of computational power and bandwidth. This, combined with the high costs of faster computing chips and interconnects, has significantly inflated High Performance Computing (HPC) construction costs. To address these challenges, we introduce the Fire-Flyer AI-HPC architecture, a synergistic hardware-software co-design framework and its best practices. For DL training, we deployed the Fire-Flyer 2 with 10,000 PCIe A100 GPUs, achieved performance approximating the DGX-A100 while reducing costs by half and energy consumption by 40%. We specifically engineered HFReduce to accelerate allreduce communication and implemented numerous measures to keep our Computation-Storage Integrated Network congestion-free. Through our software stack, including HaiScale, 3FS, and HAI-Platform, we achieved substantial scalability by overlapping computation and communication. Our system-oriented experience from DL training provides valuable insights to drive future advancements in AI-HPC.
absZh: 深度学习和大语言模型的快速发展极大地增加了对计算能力和带宽的需求，加之高速计算芯片和互连的高成本，使得高性能计算的建设成本显著上升。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Fire-Flyer AI-HPC 架构，这是一种软硬件协同设计的框架及其最佳实践。在深度学习训练中，我们部署了包含一万块 PCIe A100 GPU 的 Fire-Flyer 2，实现了接近 DGX-A100 的性能，同时成本减半、能耗降低 40%。我们专门设计了 HFReduce 来加速 allreduce 通信，并采取了多种措施确保计算-存储集成网络无拥塞。通过我们的软件栈，包括 HaiScale、3FS 和 HAI-Platform，我们通过计算与通信的重叠实现了显著的可扩展性。我们从深度学习训练中获得的系统级经验为未来 AI-HPC 的发展提供了宝贵见解。

contrib.en: Proposes Fire-Flyer AI-HPC, a cost-effective hardware-software co-design for deep learning.
contrib.zh: 提出Fire-Flyer AI-HPC，一种用于深度学习的成本效益型软硬件协同设计。

contrib.en: Deploys 10,000 PCIe A100 GPUs achieving 80% DGX-A100 performance at half cost and 40% less energy.
contrib.zh: 部署10,000块PCIe A100 GPU，以一半成本和40%能耗实现DGX-A100 80%的性能。

contrib.en: Develops HFReduce for efficient allreduce, outperforming NCCL on PCIe architecture.
contrib.zh: 开发HFReduce实现高效全规约，在PCIe架构上优于NCCL。

contrib.en: Implements HaiScale with overlapping computation and communication for scalable LLM training.
contrib.zh: 实现HaiScale，通过计算与通信重叠实现可扩展的大语言模型训练。

contrib.en: Designs 3FS distributed file system with request-to-send control to mitigate incast congestion.
contrib.zh: 设计3FS分布式文件系统，采用请求发送控制机制缓解incast拥塞。

contrib.en: Integrates HAI Platform for task scheduling, fault handling, and disaster recovery, achieving 99% GPU utilization.
contrib.zh: 集成HAI平台实现任务调度、故障处理和灾难恢复，GPU利用率达99%。

limits.en: Performance gap between PCIe A100 and SXM A100 remains, limiting peak throughput.
limits.zh: PCIe A100与SXM A100之间存在性能差距，限制了峰值吞吐量。

limits.en: HFReduce performance bottlenecked by AMD EPYC CPU PCIe host bridge bandwidth.
limits.zh: HFReduce性能受限于AMD EPYC CPU的PCIe主机桥带宽。

limits.en: NVLink bridge added later for LLMs, but introduces additional failure points.
limits.zh: 为LLM后期添加NVLink桥，但引入了额外故障点。

limits.en: Network congestion control disabled DCQCN due to parameter tuning difficulties.
limits.zh: 因参数调优困难，网络拥塞控制禁用了DCQCN。

limits.en: Two-zone network limits cross-zone tasks to one at a time, reducing flexibility.
limits.zh: 双区网络限制跨区任务同时只能运行一个，降低了灵活性。

full.sec: Abstract
full.secZh: 摘要

items.en: The rapid progress in Deep Learning (DL) and Large Language Models (LLMs) has exponentially increased demands of computational power and bandwidth. This, combined with the high costs of faster computing chips and interconnects, has significantly inflated High Performance Computing (HPC) construction costs. To address these challenges, we introduce the Fire-Flyer AI-HPC architecture, a synergistic hardware-software co-design framework and its best practices. For DL training, we deployed the Fire-Flyer 2 with 10,000 PCIe A100 GPUs, achieved performance approximating the DGX-A100 while reducing costs by half and energy consumption by 40%. We specifically engineered HFReduce to accelerate allreduce communication and implemented numerous measures to keep our Computation-Storage Integrated Network congestion-free. Through our software stack, including HaiScale, 3FS, and HAI-Platform, we achieved substantial scalability by overlapping computation and communication. Our system-oriented experience from DL training provides valuable insights to drive future advancements in AI-HPC.
items.zh: 深度学习和大语言模型的快速发展极大地增加了对算力和带宽的需求。加之更快的计算芯片和互连成本高昂，高性能计算的构建成本显著膨胀。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了Fire-Flyer AI-HPC架构，这是一个软硬件协同设计的框架及其最佳实践。针对深度学习训练，我们部署了包含10,000块PCIe A100 GPU的Fire-Flyer 2，其性能接近DGX-A100，同时成本降低一半，能耗减少40%。我们专门设计了HFReduce来加速allreduce通信，并采取了多项措施确保计算存储融合网络无拥塞。通过我们的软件栈（包括HaiScale、3FS和HAI-Platform），我们通过计算与通信重叠实现了显著的可扩展性。我们从深度学习训练中积累的系统级经验为未来AI-HPC的进步提供了宝贵见解。

full.sec: I Introduction
full.secZh: 一、引言

items.en: In recent years, Deep Learning (DL)[1] has developed rapidly and is widely used in image recognition, speech recognition, content generation, autonomous driving, and other areas. The rapid development of DL is fundamentally tied to the support rendered by data. Training with copious amounts of data demands massive computational resources. Relying on Moore’s Law[2], computer speeds double every two years on average, but the pace of DL far exceeds this speed. In particular, Large Language Models (LLMs)[3, 4, 5, 6, 7] that have become popular in recent years have exploded the demand for computational resources and memory. The parameters of LLMs can reach tens to thousands of billions, requiring hundreds or thousands of GPUs for training. Although LLM training is challenging, the emerging capabilities resulting from more parameters have shown the benefits of continued model expansion. Since then, researchers have gone down the path of making models bigger and never looked back. To acquire more computational resources, people have to expand more nodes. This leads to a surge in the cost of building AI infrastructure. How to reduce the cost of new data centers and how to build cost-effective clusters are also hot and challenging problems. Moreover, more nodes lead to higher energy consumption, which contradicts this era’s goal of reducing carbon emissions and achieving carbon neutrality. Reducing energy consumption is also a challenging problem.
items.zh: 近年来，深度学习发展迅速，广泛应用于图像识别、语音识别、内容生成、自动驾驶等领域。深度学习的快速发展根本上依赖于数据的支持。使用大量数据进行训练需要海量计算资源。根据摩尔定律，计算机速度平均每两年翻一番，但深度学习的发展速度远超于此。尤其是近年来流行的大语言模型，对计算资源和内存的需求呈爆炸式增长。大语言模型的参数可达数百亿至数千亿，需要数百甚至数千块GPU进行训练。尽管大语言模型训练充满挑战，但更多参数带来的涌现能力显示了持续扩大模型规模的好处。自此，研究人员走上了让模型越来越大的道路，并且从未回头。为了获得更多计算资源，人们不得不扩展更多节点。这导致AI基础设施的建设成本激增。如何降低新数据中心的成本以及如何构建高性价比的集群也是热门且具有挑战性的问题。此外，更多节点导致更高的能耗，这与本世纪减少碳排放和实现碳中和的目标相悖。降低能耗也是一个具有挑战性的问题。

items.en: In this paper, leverage our practical experience accumulated over the years to propose cost-effective strategies cost-effective strategies for constructing AI-HPC systems suitable for deep learning and LLMs.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们利用多年积累的实践经验，提出了构建适用于深度学习和LLM的AI-HPC系统的成本效益策略。

items.en: We have deployed a cluster composed of 10,000 PCIe A100 GPUs for Deep Learning training purposes. Details about the GPU nodes and network topology are provided in Section III-A, where we compare our architecture to the NVIDIA DGX-A100 [8] in terms of cost-effectiveness and lower CO2 emissions. In contrast, we must invest more in software optimizations to address the performance challenges of the PCIe architecture. The following sections will discuss about software-hardware co-design.
items.zh: 我们部署了一个由10,000块PCIe A100 GPU组成的集群，用于深度学习训练。GPU节点和网络拓扑的详细信息见第III-A节，我们在该节中将我们的架构与NVIDIA DGX-A100在成本效益和更低的二氧化碳排放方面进行了比较。相比之下，我们必须投入更多软件优化来应对PCIe架构的性能挑战。以下各节将讨论软硬件协同设计。

full.sec: Key Technical Topics in our Architecture
full.secZh: 架构中的关键技术主题

items.en: Network Co-Design: The Two-Layer Fat-Tree Network[9] integrates storage and computation network, as shown in Section III-B. The entire network is divided into two zones, and the platform supports cross-zone tasks. To prevent congestion, we employed various network tunings detailed in Section VI-A.
items.zh: 网络协同设计：两层胖树网络融合了存储和计算网络，如第III-B节所示。整个网络分为两个区域，平台支持跨区域任务。为防止拥塞，我们采用了多种网络调优，详见第VI-A节。

items.en: HFReduce: Achieves computation-communication overlap via asynchronous allreduce on the CPU, outperforming NVIDIA Collective Communications Library (NCCL)[10] on our PCIe architecture, as discussed in Section IV.
items.zh: HFReduce：通过CPU上的异步allreduce实现计算与通信重叠，在我们的PCIe架构上性能优于NVIDIA集体通信库，如第IV节所述。

items.en: HaiScale: As described in Section V, optimizes parallelism methods for our PCIe architecture, such as Data Parallelism (DP), Pipeline Parallelism (PP)[11][12], Tensor Parallelism (TP)[13][14], Experts Parallelism (EP) [15, 16, 17], Fully Sharded Data Parallel(FSDP)[18] and Zero Redundancy Optimizer(ZeRO)[19].
items.zh: HaiScale：如第V节所述，针对我们的PCIe架构优化了并行方法，例如数据并行、流水线并行、张量并行、专家并行、全分片数据并行和零冗余优化器。

items.en: 3FS Distributed File System: Addresses I/O bottlenecks in big data AI tasks, configures with our communication and network tuning, reduces congestion in storage and computation integrated network topology, as detailed in Section VI-B.
items.zh: 3FS分布式文件系统：解决大数据AI任务中的I/O瓶颈，结合我们的通信和网络调优配置，减少存储和计算融合网络拓扑中的拥塞，详见第VI-B节。

items.en: HAI Platform[20]: Offers task scheduling, fault handling, and disaster recovery, enhancing utilization and reducing costs. It provides an open-box solution for deep-learning researchers. It is already open-sourced: https://github.com/HFAiLab/hai-platform
items.zh: HAI平台：提供任务调度、故障处理和灾难恢复，提高利用率并降低成本。它为深度学习研究人员提供了开箱即用的解决方案。该平台已开源：https://github.com/HFAiLab/hai-platform

items.en: These are crucial topics in HPC. Our systems are equipped with robust mechanisms to handle hardware failures, minimizing downtime and impact on operations. These mechanisms, discussed in Section VII, include:
items.zh: 这些是HPC中的关键主题。我们的系统配备了强大的机制来处理硬件故障，最大限度地减少停机时间和运营影响。这些机制在第VII节中讨论，包括：

items.en: Disaster recovery through our checkpoint manager
items.zh: 通过检查点管理器进行灾难恢复

items.en: A validator utility for detecting hardware failures
items.zh: 用于检测硬件故障的验证工具

items.en: An overview of real hardware failure data from our cluster over the past year.
items.zh: 过去一年集群中真实硬件故障数据的概览。

items.en: We hope these insights will be beneficial to industry peers and researchers alike.
items.zh: 我们希望这些见解对行业同行和研究人员都有所帮助。

items.en: In Section VIII, we address some common questions regarding PCIe architecture, such as congestion control, maintenance cost, and stability compared with other architectures. In Section IX, we propose the next generation of PCIe architecture, which is aimed at Mixture-of-Experts Large Language Models training and primarily utilizes multi-NICs and a Multi-Plane network.
items.zh: 在第VIII节中，我们解答了关于PCIe架构的一些常见问题，例如拥塞控制、维护成本以及与其他架构相比的稳定性。在第IX节中，我们提出了下一代PCIe架构，该架构针对混合专家大语言模型训练，主要利用多网卡和多平面网络。

full.sec: II-A Evolution of Deep Learning
full.secZh: 二-A 深度学习的发展

items.en: The revolution in Machine Learning and Deep Learning began in 2012 with AlexNet[21], which outperformed traditional methods in image classification, marking the onset of big data utilization and increased computational demands. The emergence of ResNet[22], with its deeper layers, further broadened the horizons of image processing, truly bringing about the “deep” in “Deep Learning”. At the same time, big data-driven model training nudged the evolution of data storage technology, leading to the advent of all-flash SSD distributed file systems.
items.zh: 机器学习和深度学习的革命始于2012年的AlexNet，它在图像分类上超越了传统方法，标志着大数据利用和计算需求增加的开始。ResNet的出现，凭借其更深的层次，进一步拓宽了图像处理的视野，真正带来了“深度学习”中的“深度”。同时，大数据驱动的模型训练推动了数据存储技术的发展，导致了全闪存SSD分布式文件系统的出现。

items.en: Fast forward to 2017, Google’s Transformer[23] made its grand entry, introducing the concept of ”Attention is all you need”, shaking up the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP). With the advent of more complex models like AlphaFold[24] and AlphaZero[25] highlighting the need for more computational power and memory, revealing the limitations of traditional FP64 / FP32 computing devices.
items.zh: 快进到2017年，谷歌的Transformer隆重登场，引入了“注意力就是一切”的概念，震撼了自然语言处理领域。随着AlphaFold和AlphaZero等更复杂模型的出现，对计算能力和内存的需求凸显，揭示了传统FP64/FP32计算设备的局限性。

items.en: Entering the 2020s saw the rise of LLMs as a game-changer in the AI sector. Research indicates that an upscale in the number of language model parameters and computational budget can significantly enhance model performance, given adequate training data. Consequently, despite requiring colossal computational resources, efforts are being made to train large models on tens or hundreds of billions or even trillions of parameters. Pioneering examples include GPT-3[26] and PaLM[27], which occupy close to 1TB of GPU Memory. Recognizing the potential, industry giants have set up large AI clusters to train LLMs while constantly investing in computational power chips.
items.zh: 进入2020年代，LLM的兴起成为AI领域的游戏规则改变者。研究表明，在充足训练数据下，增加语言模型参数数量和计算预算可以显著提升模型性能。因此，尽管需要巨大的计算资源，人们仍在努力训练拥有数百亿、数千亿甚至数万亿参数的模型。典型的例子包括GPT-3和PaLM，它们占用近1TB的GPU内存。认识到这一潜力，行业巨头建立了大型AI集群来训练LLM，并不断投资于计算芯片。

items.en: The shift towards the Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) Models[28, 29, 30] architecture starting from GPT-4[7], and the recent AI Generated Content (AIGC) multi-modal (Sora[31]) has amplified the demand for memory and computational resources. However, as AI development outpaces hardware development, leading to skyrocketing training costs, adopting cost-saving solutions has become imperative.
items.zh: 从GPT-4开始向混合专家模型架构的转变，以及最近AI生成内容多模态模型的出现，加剧了对内存和计算资源的需求。然而，随着AI发展超越硬件发展，导致训练成本飙升，采用节约成本的解决方案变得势在必行。

full.sec: II-B Challenges and Solutions in Models Training
full.secZh: 二-B 模型训练的挑战与解决方案

items.en: In Deep Learning training, a single task demands hundreds of GPUs and consumes substantial storage and network resources. This massive scale introduces system-level challenges:
items.zh: 在深度学习训练中，单个任务需要数百个GPU，并消耗大量存储和网络资源。这种大规模带来了系统层面的挑战：

items.en: Firstly, achieving efficient training at this magnitude is crucial. Model FLOPs Utilization (MFU), which assesses the ratio of observed throughput to theoretical maximum throughput (assuming 100% peak FLOPS), serves as the standard metric for evaluating training efficiency. Training LLMs involves dividing models among GPUs that communicate extensively for progress. Besides communication, factors like operation optimization, data pre-processing, and GPU memory consumption significantly influence MFU. Multiple parallel strategies are employed to enhance efficiency:
items.zh: 首先，在此规模下实现高效训练至关重要。模型FLOPS利用率（MFU）评估观察到的吞吐量与理论最大吞吐量（假设100%峰值FLOPS）的比率，是衡量训练效率的标准指标。训练LLM涉及将模型划分到多个GPU上，这些GPU需要大量通信以推进训练。除了通信，操作优化、数据预处理和GPU内存消耗等因素也显著影响MFU。为了提升效率，采用了多种并行策略：

items.en: Data Parallelism (DP): Models and optimizer states are replicated across multiple devices with data evenly distributed to all. For LLMs training, the Zero Redundancy Optimizer (ZeRO)[19] further enhances this method by sharding these states on each data parallel process and using allgather and reduce-scatter for parameter fetching and gradient calculation.
items.zh: 数据并行（DP）：模型和优化器状态在多个设备上复制，数据均匀分布到所有设备。对于LLM训练，零冗余优化器（ZeRO）[19]通过在每个数据并行进程上分片这些状态，并使用allgather和reduce-scatter进行参数获取和梯度计算，进一步增强了该方法。

items.en: Pipeline Parallelism (PP): Each device holds a portion of the model layers with each training batch divided into micro-batches for pipeline execution. Efficient scheduling strategies like GPipe[11], PipeDream 1F1B[12], and Zero Bubble Pipeline Parallelism (ZBPP)[33], are required to minimize “pipeline bubbles”.
items.zh: 流水线并行（PP）：每个设备持有模型层的一部分，每个训练批次被划分为微批次以进行流水线执行。需要高效的调度策略，如GPipe[11]、PipeDream 1F1B[12]和零气泡流水线并行（ZBPP）[33]，以最小化“流水线气泡”。

items.en: Tensor Parallelism (TP): This involves placing a model layer on multiple GPUs that perform computations in parallel[13][14]. It includes row-wise and column-wise parallelism, necessitating allgather and all2all for input splitting and output merging.
items.zh: 张量并行（TP）：这涉及将模型层放置在多个GPU上，这些GPU并行执行计算[13][14]。它包括行并行和列并行，需要allgather和all2all进行输入分割和输出合并。

items.en: Expert Parallelism (EP): MoE Models’ different expert models are distributed on different GPUs during MoE training[15, 16, 17]. The gate model selects tokens for allocation during input, with corresponding tokens sent to experts model via all2all communication.
items.zh: 专家并行（EP）：在MoE训练期间，MoE模型的不同专家模型分布在不同的GPU上[15, 16, 17]。门控模型在输入时选择要分配的token，相应的token通过all2all通信发送到专家模型。

items.en: Fully Sharded Data Parallel (FSDP) is an implementation based on the ZeRO Stage 3 algorithm[19]. FSDP partitions the model’s parameters, optimizer states, and gradients, distributing them across different GPUs, with each GPU retaining only 1/n1𝑛1/n of the total. During forward propagation, FSDP performs an allgather operation to assemble the complete parameters, which are then released after the forward pass is completed. Similarly, during backward propagation, FSDP conducts an allgather operation to obtain the complete parameters, followed by backward computation to calculate gradients. It then performs a reduce-scatter operation to synchronize gradients across all GPUs, resulting in each GPU holding 1/n1𝑛1/n of the reduced gradients. Finally, FSDP updates the 1/n1𝑛1/n parameters using each GPU’s 1/n1𝑛1/n gradients and optimizer states. FSDP reduces GPU memory usage by maintaining only 1/n1𝑛1/n of the parameters, gradients, and optimizer states on each GPU, enabling training of larger-scale models.
items.zh: 全分片数据并行（FSDP）是基于ZeRO Stage 3算法[19]的实现。FSDP将模型的参数、优化器状态和梯度进行分区，分布到不同的GPU上，每个GPU仅保留总数的1/n。在前向传播过程中，FSDP执行allgather操作以组装完整的参数，前向传播完成后释放这些参数。类似地，在反向传播过程中，FSDP执行allgather操作以获取完整参数，然后进行反向计算以计算梯度。接着，它执行reduce-scatter操作以在所有GPU上同步梯度，使得每个GPU持有缩减后梯度的1/n。最后，FSDP使用每个GPU的1/n梯度和优化器状态更新1/n参数。FSDP通过在每个GPU上仅维护1/n的参数、梯度和优化器状态来减少GPU内存使用，从而能够训练更大规模的模型。

items.en: There are additional strategies and algorithms to accelerate training or reduce memory usage, such as Activation Recomputation[34, 35], as well as enhanced communication and computation overlap during parallelism[36], among others.
items.zh: 还有其他加速训练或减少内存使用的策略和算法，例如激活重计算[34, 35]，以及在并行过程中增强通信和计算重叠[36]等。

items.en: The second challenge is achieving high-stability training at scale, i.e., maintaining efficient training throughout the process. Stability is vital from a production standpoint as training a big model with a trillion tokens may span several weeks. In DL training, stragglers and hardware failures are common occurrences rather than outliers. Stragglers can decelerate tasks involving hundreds of GPUs, emphasizing the importance of stability and task recovery time.
items.zh: 第二个挑战是实现大规模下的高稳定性训练，即在整个过程中保持高效训练。从生产角度来看，稳定性至关重要，因为训练一个具有万亿token的大模型可能需要数周时间。在深度学习训练中，掉队者和硬件故障是常见现象而非异常。掉队者会减慢涉及数百个GPU的任务，凸显了稳定性和任务恢复时间的重要性。

full.sec: II-C HPC and AI Clusters of This Era
full.secZh: 二-C 当代HPC与AI集群

items.en: Traditional supercomputers such as TianHe-2A[37], Stampede 2[38], and Sunway TaihuLight[39] primarily focus on double precision calculations and do not support the FP16 precision, rendering them unsuitable for DL training. Fugaku[40], despite its high performance, does not support tensor GEMM acceleration, a key component for DL workloads. Although these supercomputers may not be well-suited for DL training, their robust high-performance networks and extensive experience in large-scale cluster construction offer valuable insights and lessons for subsequent researchers.
items.zh: 传统的超级计算机，如天河-2A[37]、Stampede 2[38]和神威·太湖之光[39]，主要专注于双精度计算，不支持FP16精度，因此不适合深度学习训练。Fugaku[40]尽管性能高，但不支持张量GEMM加速，而这是深度学习工作负载的关键组成部分。尽管这些超级计算机可能不太适合深度学习训练，但它们强大的高性能网络和在大规模集群建设方面的丰富经验为后续研究人员提供了宝贵的见解和教训。

items.en: Supercomputers like Frontier[41], Aurora[42], Summit[43] and Perlmutter[44] utilize high-performance GPUs to tackle large-scale computations. It’s worth mentioning that Perlmutter utilizes an all-flash storage system, achieving a peak bandwidth of 5TB/s. Indeed, conducting DL training on these GPU-based HPCs yields significant performance.
items.zh: 像Frontier[41]、Aurora[42]、Summit[43]和Perlmutter[44]这样的超级计算机利用高性能GPU来处理大规模计算。值得一提的是，Perlmutter采用全闪存存储系统，实现了5TB/s的峰值带宽。事实上，在这些基于GPU的高性能计算机上进行深度学习训练能产生显著的性能。

items.en: Meta, formerly Facebook, has developed its AI-HPC using a software-hardware co-design approach, with one system utilizing IB and another employing RoCE[45, 46]. ByteDance initially implemented a DL cluster with a mix of CPU and PCIe GPU[47]. However, with the advent of the LLMs era, they adopted an architecture similar to DGX, building a cluster with over 10,000 GPUs[48]. Alibaba has developed its own HPN network[49] for LLMs training using NVIDIA H800 GPUs. NVIDIA also has its own AI-HPC Eos[50], which will feature 576 DGX H100 systems totaling 4,608 H100 GPUs. While this will provide a considerable boost in computational power for AI tasks, the high cost of DGX systems raises questions about economic viability.
items.zh: Meta（前Facebook）采用软硬件协同设计的方法开发了其AI-HPC，其中一个系统使用IB，另一个使用RoCE[45, 46]。字节跳动最初使用CPU和PCIe GPU混合的方式实现了深度学习集群[47]。然而，随着LLM时代的到来，他们采用了类似DGX的架构，构建了一个拥有超过10,000个GPU的集群[48]。阿里巴巴使用NVIDIA H800 GPU开发了自己的HPN网络[49]用于LLM训练。NVIDIA也有自己的AI-HPC Eos[50]，它将包含576个DGX H100系统，总计4,608个H100 GPU。虽然这将为AI任务提供相当大的算力提升，但DGX系统的高成本引发了经济可行性的问题。

items.en: Custom-designed AI DSA (Domain Specific Architecture) accelerators like Google’s TPU[51] , utilize highly advanced optical switch reconfigurable networks. Alternatives to traditional GPU setups, like Intel Habana Gaudi[52], are also available. Teslahas introduced the Dojo[53, 54] supercomputer , which uses System on Wafer technology to build an entire silicon wafer as a single chip. Huawei has designed the Ascend AI DSA chip[55, 56], which remains competitive with NVIDIA, as noted by NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang. These accelerators are tailored for efficient execution of AI workloads, offering specialized features to optimize model training and inference. However, their software ecosystems, while progressing, still require further development to match the maturity of NVIDIA’s offerings.
items.zh: 定制设计的AI DSA（领域特定架构）加速器，如Google的TPU[51]，采用高度先进的光开关可重构网络。传统GPU设置的替代方案，如Intel Habana Gaudi[52]，也可用。特斯拉推出了Dojo[53, 54]超级计算机，它使用晶圆上系统技术将整个硅晶圆构建为单个芯片。华为设计了昇腾AI DSA芯片[55, 56]，正如NVIDIA CEO黄仁勋所指出的，该芯片与NVIDIA保持竞争力。这些加速器专为高效执行AI工作负载而定制，提供专门功能以优化模型训练和推理。然而，它们的软件生态系统虽然正在进步，但仍需进一步发展以匹配NVIDIA产品的成熟度。

items.en: Cloud service providers, such as Azure, offer flexible and scalable resources for AI training. Despite their convenience and easy accessibility, the costs can accumulate significantly over time. For long-term projects spanning around two years, these costs could amount to purchasing an entire dedicated cluster. Therefore, this option may not be the most economical choice for extensive AI computations.
items.zh: 云服务提供商，如Azure，为AI训练提供灵活且可扩展的资源。尽管它们方便且易于访问，但成本会随时间显著累积。对于持续约两年的长期项目，这些成本可能相当于购买整个专用集群。因此，对于大规模AI计算，此选项可能不是最经济的选择。

items.capZh: 图3：模型参数大小与加速器内存

full.sec: II-D Challenges in AI Infrastructure
full.secZh: 二-D AI基础设施的挑战

items.en: As models continue to grow larger, DL training requires thousands of GPUs. Additionally, researchers often need to train multiple models simultaneously. Therefore, a cluster with at least tens of thousands of GPUs can meet the needs of AI practitioners. In addition to increasing the scale of the cluster nodes and adding more GPUs, there’s also a need to find ways to save on the overall system construction costs. These costs include but are not limited to power support, cooling, networking, storage, fault handling, disaster recovery, etc. Building a cost-effective AI-HPC system is a significant challenge. The question of how to construct a high-performance, efficient, economical, and environmentally friendly HPC to meet AI training requirements has become a hot topic. Some works, such as [57] analyzes the construction of HPC, discussed the interconnection of heterogeneous clusters, cooling systems. AI applications such as Peng Cheng Cloud Brain II[58] discussed their strategies for building and improving AI computing power and cluster communication efficiency, which helped them achieve first place in IO500 and AIPerf rankings.
items.zh: 随着模型不断变大，深度学习训练需要数千个GPU。此外，研究人员通常需要同时训练多个模型。因此，一个至少拥有数万个GPU的集群可以满足AI从业者的需求。除了增加集群节点规模和添加更多GPU外，还需要找到节省整体系统建设成本的方法。这些成本包括但不限于电力支持、冷却、网络、存储、故障处理、灾难恢复等。构建经济高效的AI-HPC系统是一个重大挑战。如何构建高性能、高效、经济且环保的HPC以满足AI训练需求已成为热门话题。一些工作，如[57]分析了HPC的建设，讨论了异构集群的互连、冷却系统。AI应用如鹏城云脑II[58]讨论了其构建和提升AI算力及集群通信效率的策略，这帮助他们在IO500和AIPerf排名中获得了第一名。

items.en: Drawing from our extensive experience in Deep Learning spanning over the past decade, we have conducted considerable exploration in terms of cost-effectiveness. This work primarily discusses our practices for achieving cost-effectiveness and high-performance across different models and stages.
items.zh: 基于我们在深度学习领域过去十多年的丰富经验，我们在成本效益方面进行了大量探索。本文主要讨论了我们在不同模型和阶段实现成本效益和高性能的实践。

full.sec: III Fire-Flyer 2: Our Approach For Deep Learning and Early LLM Training
full.secZh: 三、Fire-Flyer 2：我们的深度学习和早期LLM训练方法

items.en: As mentioned in the Background Section, LLMs generally require significant memory resources. In contrast, many other models necessitate considerably less memory, as illustrated in Figure 3. Popular models like ResNet[22], Mask-RCNN[59], BERT[60], MAE[61], among others, all have a parameter volume less than 1B, signifying relatively low memory requirements. Therefore, when designing a cluster primarily for deep learning model training, and with insights gleaned from our Fire-Flyer 1 experiments, we deemed it prudent to incorporate PCIe A100 GPUs, which proved to be sufficient during its construction in 2021.
items.zh: 如背景部分所述，LLM通常需要大量内存资源。相比之下，许多其他模型所需内存要少得多，如图3所示。流行的模型如ResNet[22]、Mask-RCNN[59]、BERT[60]、MAE[61]等，参数规模均小于1B，意味着内存需求相对较低。因此，在设计主要用于深度学习模型训练的集群时，并结合我们从Fire-Flyer 1实验中获得的见解，我们认为采用PCIe A100 GPU是明智的，这在2021年构建时被证明是足够的。

full.secZh: 三-A Fire-Flyer 2：PCIe A100 GPU架构

We employed the following computation node architecture , as shown in Figure 4:

full.sec: III-B Network Topology: Two-Layer Fat-Tree with Storage and Computation Integrated
full.secZh: 三-B 网络拓扑：存储与计算融合的两层胖树

items.en: We selected the Fat-Tree[9] topology as our primary network architecture due to its exceptionally high bisection bandwidth, making it the preferred choice for AI-HPC and high-throughput storage environments. Although the Dragonfly topology[62, 63] also offers comparable cost-effectiveness and performance, its lack of sufficient bisection bandwidth makes it unsuitable for our integrated storage and computation network design. At the time of implementation, various RoCE (RDMA over Converged Ethernet) [64] technologies were not as mature as they are today, so we opted for InfiniBand (IB) as our network solution. Mellanox QM8700 InfiniBand Switch, offering 40 ports at 200 Gbps, was utilized. Our cluster, consisting of 10,000 A100 GPUs, includes approximately 1,250 GPU compute nodes and nearly 200 storage servers, although a Two-Layer Fat-Tree can accommodate up to 800 nodes (configured with 20 spine switches and 40 leaf switches).
items.zh: 我们选择Fat-Tree[9]拓扑作为主要网络架构，因为它具有极高的对分带宽，使其成为AI-HPC和高吞吐量存储环境的首选。尽管Dragonfly拓扑[62, 63]也提供了相当的成本效益和性能，但其缺乏足够的对分带宽，不适合我们的存储与计算一体化网络设计。在实施时，各种RoCE（基于融合以太网的RDMA）[64]技术尚未像今天这样成熟，因此我们选择InfiniBand (IB)作为网络解决方案。使用了Mellanox QM8700 InfiniBand交换机，提供40个200 Gbps端口。我们的集群包含10,000块A100 GPU，包括约1,250个GPU计算节点和近200个存储服务器，尽管两层Fat-Tree最多可容纳800个节点（配置20个脊交换机和40个叶交换机）。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Network Topology: Two complete Two-Layer Fat-Tree connected together.
items.capZh: 图5：网络拓扑：两个完整的双层Fat-Tree连接在一起。

items.en: To reduce costs, , we opted for a two-zone network configuration instead of a three-layer Fat-Tree solution, as shown in Figure 5. Each zone consists of an 800-port Fat-Tree connected to approximately 600 GPU compute nodes. Each storage server equipped with two IB NICs, respectively connected to different zones, hence all GPU compute nodes could share a set of storage services. Additionally, the two zones are interconnected with a limited number of links. Our HAI Platform scheduling strategy ensured that cross-zone computing tasks were limited to one at most. Whether using NCCL[10] or our in-house developed communication library HFReduce, it can be run across zones by using a double binary tree algorithm[65]. Our scheduler ensures that in this topology, only one pair of nodes communicates across zones. Consequently, even tasks requiring all nodes can efficiently run on the entire Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC.
items.zh: 为降低成本，我们选择了双区域网络配置而非三层Fat-Tree方案，如图5所示。每个区域由一个800端口Fat-Tree组成，连接约600个GPU计算节点。每个存储服务器配备两块IB网卡，分别连接到不同区域，因此所有GPU计算节点可以共享一组存储服务。此外，两个区域通过有限数量的链路互连。我们的HAI平台调度策略确保跨区域计算任务最多只有一个。无论是使用NCCL[10]还是我们内部开发的通信库HFReduce，都可以通过使用双二叉树算法[65]跨区域运行。我们的调度器确保在此拓扑中，只有一对节点跨区域通信。因此，即使需要所有节点的任务也能高效地在整个Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC上运行。

full.sec: III-C Cost Performance of Our Architecture
full.secZh: 三-C 架构的成本性能

items.en: Compared to the NVIDIA DGX-A100 [8] architecture, our approach using PCIe A100 achieves approximately 83% of the performance in TF32 and FP16 General Matrix Multiply (GEMM) benchmarks. However, it offers substantial reductions in both costs and energy usage, achieving 60% of the GPU cost and energy consumption, as detailed in Table II.
items.zh: 与NVIDIA DGX-A100 [8]架构相比，我们使用PCIe A100的方法在TF32和FP16通用矩阵乘法（GEMM）基准测试中实现了约83%的性能。然而，它在成本和能耗上大幅降低，实现了GPU成本和能耗的60%，详见表II。

items.en: Contrasting with the DGX-A100 cluster, which necessitates a Three-Layer Fat-Tree encompassing 10,000 access points and involving 320 core switches, 500 spine switches and 500 leaf switches, amounting to 1,320 switches in total (as shown in Table III), our architecture only requires 122 switches. This arrangement is significantly more cost-efficient. Even when compared to a similarly sized three-layer Fat-Tree network with 1,600 access points, which includes 40 core switches and 160 spine and leaf switches (totaling 200 switches), our design facilitates a saving of 40% in networking costs.
items.zh: 与DGX-A100集群相比，后者需要三层Fat-Tree，包含10,000个接入点，涉及320个核心交换机、500个脊交换机和500个叶交换机，总计1,320个交换机（如表III所示），我们的架构仅需122个交换机。这种安排显著提高了成本效益。即使与类似规模的三层Fat-Tree网络（1,600个接入点，包括40个核心交换机和160个脊叶交换机，总计200个交换机）相比，我们的设计节省了40%的网络成本。

items.en: Furthermore, by utilizing an 800-Ports Frame Switch, we have further reduced the cost of optical modules and cables. While there is a performance gap due to the inherent differences between PCIe card specifications and SXM, we generally achieved 80% of the DGX-A100 performance at merely 60% of the cost. Additionally, we managed to trim energy consumption by 40%, thereby reducing CO2 emissions. In terms of cost-performance, we regard this approach as both effective and successful.
items.zh: 此外，通过使用800端口框架交换机，我们进一步降低了光模块和线缆的成本。尽管由于PCIe卡规格与SXM之间的固有差异存在性能差距，我们通常以仅60%的成本实现了DGX-A100 80%的性能。此外，我们成功削减了40%的能耗，从而减少了CO2排放。在性价比方面，我们认为这种方法既有效又成功。

full.sec: IV HFReduce: Hardware Software Co-Design in Network
full.secZh: 四、HFReduce：网络中的软硬件协同设计

items.en: In large-scale deep learning training, allreduce is essential for aggregating gradients across GPUs. To optimize communication among PCIe GPUs in our architecture, we developed HFReduce, a library specifically designed for efficient allreduce operations. The core strategy of HFReduce, illustrated in Figure 6, involves performing intra-node reduction first, followed by inter-node allreduce of the reduced data from the 8 GPUs within each node. This inter-node allreduce leverages a Double Binary Tree Algorithm[65], akin to NCCL, and is pipelined by dividing data into chunks for transfer via Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA), ensuring high performance. HFReduce is versatile and can be applied to any scenario requiring allreduce, as well as general reduce and broadcast operations.
items.zh: 在大规模深度学习训练中，allreduce对于跨GPU聚合梯度至关重要。为了优化我们架构中PCIe GPU之间的通信，我们开发了HFReduce，一个专门用于高效allreduce操作的库。HFReduce的核心策略如图6所示，首先进行节点内归约，然后对每个节点内8个GPU的归约数据进行节点间allreduce。这种节点间allreduce采用双二叉树算法[65]，类似于NCCL，并通过将数据分块通过远程直接内存访问（RDMA）传输进行流水线化，确保高性能。HFReduce通用性强，可应用于任何需要allreduce的场景，以及一般的归约和广播操作。

items.capEn: Figure 6: HFReduce Schematic: 1) do intra-node reduce, 2) do inter-node allreduce by CPU, 3) finally transfer reduced data to GPU.
items.capZh: 图6：HFReduce示意图：1）进行节点内归约，2）通过CPU进行节点间allreduce，3）最后将归约数据传输到GPU。

full.sec: IV-A HFReduce Algorithm Steps
full.secZh: 四-A HFReduce算法步骤

items.en: Intra-node reduction, as shown in the Algorithm 1:
items.zh: 节点内归约，如算法1所示：

items.en: When the gradients data on the GPUs require allreduce, HFReduce asynchronously transfers these data to the CPU memory. This Device-To-Host (D2H) Transfer can utilize GDRCopy[66] for small data and MemCpyAsync for larger data.
items.zh: 当GPU上的梯度数据需要allreduce时，HFReduce异步将这些数据传输到CPU内存。这种设备到主机（D2H）传输对于小数据可以使用GDRCopy[66]，对于较大数据使用MemCpyAsync。

items.en: Upon the arrival of the gradients in memory, perform reduction add operation using CPU vector instructions.
items.zh: 梯度数据到达内存后，使用CPU向量指令执行归约加法操作。

items.en: Inter-node reduction, as shown in the Algorithm 2:
items.zh: 节点间归约，如算法2所示：

items.en: Use the Double Binary Tree Algorithm[65] for inter-node allreduce, facilitating transfers between nodes using RDMA verbs implementation.
items.zh: 使用双二叉树算法[65]进行节点间allreduce，通过RDMA动词实现节点间传输。

items.en: Finally, the CPU returns reduced gradients to the GPU via PCIe (Host-To-Device Phase).
items.zh: 最后，CPU通过PCIe将归约后的梯度返回给GPU（主机到设备阶段）。

items.en: The final Host-To-Device (H2D) Transfer can be optimized by utilizing GDRCopy to write data to four GPUs within the same NUMA node, effectively reducing reads from host memory by threefold compared to MemCpyAsync. This efficiency is achieved because GDRCopy can read data from host memory and temporarily cache it in the CPU caches, allowing data to be written to the four GPUs without additional reads from host memory.
items.zh: 最终的主机到设备（H2D）传输可以通过使用GDRCopy将数据写入同一NUMA节点内的四个GPU来优化，与MemCpyAsync相比，从主机内存的读取次数减少三倍。这种效率是因为GDRCopy可以从主机内存读取数据并临时缓存在CPU缓存中，从而无需额外从主机内存读取即可将数据写入四个GPU。

full.sec: IV-B Advantages of HFReduce over NCCL
full.secZh: 四-B HFReduce相对于NCCL的优势

items.en: Let n𝑛n be the total number of GPUs involved in the communication. In NCCL’s ring topology, each unit of data needs to go through 2​n−12𝑛12n-1 transmissions, each consuming one unit of inbound bandwidth of one GPU and one unit of outbound bandwidth of another GPU. This means for a single unit of data, it consumes 2​n−1n2𝑛1𝑛\frac{2n-1}{n} unit of PCIe bidirectional bandwidth. In contrast, for each unit of data, HFReduce only requires one D2H and one H2D data transfer, only one unit of PCIe bidirectional bandwidth is consumed. In our machine architecture, the performance of NCCL is mainly limited by PCIe bandwidth. Therefore, HFReduce can achieve better performance than NCCL.
items.zh: 设n为参与通信的GPU总数。在NCCL的环形拓扑中，每个数据单元需要经过2n-1次传输，每次消耗一个GPU的一个入站带宽单元和另一个GPU的一个出站带宽单元。这意味着对于单个数据单元，它消耗(2n-1)/n单位的PCIe双向带宽。相比之下，对于每个数据单元，HFReduce只需要一次D2H和一次H2D数据传输，仅消耗一个单位的PCIe双向带宽。在我们的机器架构中，NCCL的性能主要受限于PCIe带宽。因此，HFReduce可以实现比NCCL更好的性能。

items.en: HFReduce utilizes the GPU’s Copy Engine (CE) for PCIe asynchronous transfers. In contrast, NCCL’s allreduce operation requires GPU kernel execution, which can affect other computational kernels on the GPU. HFReduce achieves complete asynchrony with no overhead.
items.zh: HFReduce利用GPU的复制引擎（CE）进行PCIe异步传输。相比之下，NCCL的allreduce操作需要执行GPU内核，这可能会影响GPU上的其他计算内核。HFReduce实现了完全异步且无开销。

items.en: As demonstrated in Figure 7(a), HFReduce can reach a inter-node bandwidths of 6.3-8.1GB/s when performing allreduce with a data size of 186 MiB on the Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC, while NCCL’s inter-node bandwidth is only 1.6-4.8GB/s.
items.zh: 如图7(a)所示，在Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC上，当对186 MiB的数据量执行allreduce时，HFReduce可以达到6.3-8.1 GB/s的节点间带宽，而NCCL的节点间带宽仅为1.6-4.8 GB/s。

full.sec: IV-C Performance Improvements: HFReduce with NVLink
full.secZh: 四-C 性能提升：HFReduce与NVLink

items.en: By installing the NVLink Bridge for PCIe A100 GPUs, efficient communication is enabled between paired GPUs via the 600 GB/s NVLink. To alleviate the memory bound issue of the original HFReduce, we implemented another allreduce pattern, termed HFReduce with NVLink. The core concept involves initially performing a reduction operation among GPUs interconnected by NVLink before passing the gradient to the CPU. Subsequently, when the CPU returns the result, it splits the result data and returns them to the paired GPUs connected by NVLink respectively, then performs allgather via NVLink. As illustrated in Figure 7(b), HFReduce with NVLink achieves inter-node bandwidths exceeding 10 GB/s.
items.zh: 通过为PCIe A100 GPU安装NVLink桥接器，配对GPU之间可以通过600 GB/s的NVLink实现高效通信。为了缓解原始HFReduce的内存限制问题，我们实现了另一种allreduce模式，称为带NVLink的HFReduce。核心思想是：在将梯度传递给CPU之前，先在通过NVLink互连的GPU之间执行归约操作。随后，当CPU返回结果时，它将结果数据拆分并分别返回给通过NVLink连接的配对GPU，然后通过NVLink执行allgather。如图7(b)所示，带NVLink的HFReduce实现了超过10 GB/s的节点间带宽。

full.sec: IV-D Deep Analysis of HFReduce
full.secZh: 四-D HFReduce的深入分析

items.en: Using GDRCopy accelerate small data transfer in D2H, and educing reads from host memory by three times compared to MemCpyAsyn.
items.zh: 使用GDRCopy加速D2H中的小数据传输，并将主机内存的读取次数减少为MemCpyAsync的三分之一。

items.en: Intra-Node Reduction: CPU utilizes SIMD instructions and supports FP32 / FP16 / BF16 / FP8 datatypes.
items.zh: 节点内归约：CPU利用SIMD指令，支持FP32/FP16/BF16/FP8数据类型。

items.en: NUMA Awareness: D2H destination memory is interleaved across two NUMA nodes for maximum bandwidth. Memory for CPU-added results and network-received data is bound to the IB-Nic’s NUMA node to minimize latency.
items.zh: NUMA感知：D2H目标内存在两个NUMA节点间交错分配，以获得最大带宽。CPU加结果和网络接收数据的内存绑定到IB网卡的NUMA节点，以最小化延迟。

items.en: Inter-Node Reduce:Implements a Double Binary Tree allreduce algorithm[65] via ibverbs RDMA Write, avoiding additional overhead.
items.zh: 节点间归约：通过ibverbs RDMA Write实现双二叉树allreduce算法[65]，避免额外开销。

items.en: We consulted AMD and NVIDIA engineers to identify the root cause of NCCL’s suboptimal performance on PCIe architecture, particularly with EPYC Rome CPU servers. It was determined that the Rome CPUs do not support the chained write feature, which can significantly accelerate PCIe peer-to-peer (P2P) transfers between GPUs and IB NICs. Our tests indicate that the maximum bandwidth between the GPU and IB NIC on Rome CPUs is approximately 9 GiB/s, making the observed 4GB/s all-reduce bandwidth for NCCL understandable. HFReduce circumvents this limitation by utilizing the CPU for reduction and transferring data through IB and host memory.
items.zh: 我们咨询了AMD和NVIDIA的工程师，以确定NCCL在PCIe架构（尤其是EPYC Rome CPU服务器）上性能不佳的根本原因。确定Rome CPU不支持链式写入功能，该功能可以显著加速GPU与IB网卡之间的PCIe点对点（P2P）传输。我们的测试表明，在Rome CPU上，GPU与IB网卡之间的最大带宽约为9 GiB/s，因此NCCL观察到的4 GB/s allreduce带宽是可以理解的。HFReduce通过利用CPU进行归约并通过IB和主机内存传输数据来规避这一限制。

items.en: When considering the total memory operations on a single node during HFReduce, several factors contribute to its performance limitations:
items.zh: 在考虑HFReduce期间单个节点上的总内存操作时，有几个因素导致其性能受限：

items.en: Intra-node Reduce Add Phase involves 8 read operations and 1 write operation.
items.zh: 节点内归约加阶段涉及8次读取操作和1次写入操作。

items.en: Inter-node Allreduce Phase: IB send demands 2 read operations, while IB receive requires 2 write operations, along with 1 read operation for reduce add.
items.zh: 节点间Allreduce阶段：IB发送需要2次读取操作，而IB接收需要2次写入操作，以及1次用于归约加的读取操作。

items.en: H2D Phase Utilizing GDRCopy can reduce this to only 2 read operations, whereas MemCopy necessitates 8 read operations.
items.zh: H2D阶段：利用GDRCopy可以将其减少到仅2次读取操作，而MemCopy需要8次读取操作。

items.en: In total, the memory operations amount to 24 times the original data size in the GPU. A host equipped with 16 channels of DDR4-3200MHz memory can achieve a practical memory access speed of 320GB/s. Consequently, the theoretical maximum speed of HFReduce is approximately 13.3GB/s, but when considering the allreduce algorithm bandwidth and network bandwidth, this value realistically approximates 12GB/s. However, our tests only achieved slightly over 8GB/s.
items.zh: 总计，GPU中的内存操作量是原始数据大小的24倍。配备16通道DDR4-3200MHz内存的主机可以实现320GB/s的实际内存访问速度。因此，HFReduce的理论最大速度约为13.3GB/s，但考虑到allreduce算法带宽和网络带宽，该值实际接近12GB/s。然而，我们的测试仅达到略高于8GB/s。

items.en: The root cause of this discrepancy is another limitation of the EPYC CPUs. As previously mentioned, our GPU5 and GPU6 are directly connected to the CPU via the same PCIe Root Complex Port (also known as the PCIe Host Bridge). In AMD EPYC Rome and Milan CPUs, the maximum bandwidth from the Root Complex Port to the CPU’s internal bus is about 37.5GB/s. Although a PCIe 4.0 x16 port can achieve over 27GB/s from GPU to CPU, when two GPUs transfer data concurrently, the bandwidth is limited to around 37GB/s. Furthermore, if bidirectional data transfer occurs simultaneously, this bandwidth decreases even further. As a result, HFReduce does not reach its theoretical speed.
items.zh: 这种差异的根本原因是EPYC CPU的另一个限制。如前所述，我们的GPU5和GPU6通过相同的PCIe根复合体端口（也称为PCIe主机桥）直接连接到CPU。在AMD EPYC Rome和Milan CPU中，从根复合体端口到CPU内部总线的最大带宽约为37.5GB/s。尽管PCIe 4.0 x16端口可以实现从GPU到CPU超过27GB/s的带宽，但当两个GPU同时传输数据时，带宽限制在约37GB/s。此外，如果同时发生双向数据传输，该带宽会进一步降低。因此，HFReduce未能达到其理论速度。

items.en: Employing NVLink with HFReduce offers a functional method to alleviate these bottlenecks. However, it is worth noting that the next-generation CPUs, such as the EPYC Genoa, still face issues with PCIe Host Bridge bandwidth, which cannot support two full-speed PCIe ports simultaneously. We hope AMD will address this issue in future iterations.
items.zh: 在HFReduce中使用NVLink提供了一种缓解这些瓶颈的有效方法。然而，值得注意的是，下一代CPU（如EPYC Genoa）仍然面临PCIe主机桥带宽问题，无法同时支持两个全速PCIe端口。我们希望AMD在未来的迭代中解决这个问题。

full.sec: V-A HaiScale DDP Overlap AllReduce in Training
full.secZh: 五-A HaiScale DDP训练中的重叠AllReduce

items.en: HaiScale Distributed Data Parallel (DDP) is a training tool that utilizes HFReduce as its communication backend, in contrast to PyTorch’s DDP[67] which employs NCCL as its backend. During the backpropagation phase, HaiScale DDP performs an asynchronous allreduce operation on the computed gradients, allowing this communication to overlap with the computation involved in backpropagation.
items.zh: HaiScale分布式数据并行（DDP）是一种训练工具，它使用HFReduce作为通信后端，而PyTorch的DDP[67]使用NCCL作为后端。在反向传播阶段，HaiScale DDP对计算出的梯度执行异步allreduce操作，使得该通信可以与反向传播中的计算重叠。

items.en: As previously mentioned, HFReduce does not depend on GPU Streaming Multiprocessors (SM) for reduction computation, enabling completely asynchronous allreduce without impacting performance. As shown in Figure 8(a), training VGG16 model[68] with HFReduce takes only half the time compared to using Torch DDP’s NCCL backend, achieving nearly 88% parallel scalability when scale from 32 GPUs to 512.
items.zh: 如前所述，HFReduce不依赖GPU流多处理器（SM）进行规约计算，从而能够实现完全异步的全规约而不影响性能。如图8(a)所示，使用HFReduce训练VGG16模型[68]所需时间仅为使用Torch DDP的NCCL后端的一半，在从32个GPU扩展到512个时实现了近88%的并行可扩展性。

full.sec: V-B LLMs Training Optimization
full.secZh: 五-B LLM训练优化

items.en: Our HaiScale framework various parallelism strategies for training large language models (LLMs), similar to Megagron[69] and DeepSpeed[70]. We have made specific engineering optimizations for our PCIe architecture across Data Parallelism (DP), Pipeline Parallelism (PP)[11][12], Tensor Parallelism (TP)[14], Expert Parallelism (EP) [15, 16, 17].
items.zh: 我们的HaiScale框架支持多种并行策略用于训练大语言模型（LLM），类似于Megatron[69]和DeepSpeed[70]。我们针对PCIe架构在数据并行（DP）、流水线并行（PP）[11][12]、张量并行（TP）[14]和专家并行（EP）[15,16,17]方面进行了特定的工程优化。

items.en: With the advent of LLMs, we integrated the NVLink Bridge into our system. This addition established a bandwidth of 600GB/s between each pair of GPUs, enabling more efficient when performing Tensor Parallelism.
items.zh: 随着LLM的出现，我们将NVLink桥接集成到系统中。这一新增功能在每对GPU之间建立了600GB/s的带宽，使得执行张量并行时更加高效。

items.en: In our architecture, there is only one IB NIC for 8 GPUs on a single node, which can lead to network bandwidth contention during Pipeline Parallelism (PP). We solve this by configuring Data Parallelism (DP) rank, making the 8 GPUs on the same node belong to different DP ranks which staggers the timing of PP for each DP rank. As Figure 9(a) shown, when scaling from 64 GPUs to 512 GPUs, the step time of training LLaMa-13B[71] decreases from 64.118 seconds to 9.717 seconds, achieving a parallel efficiency of 91%.
items.zh: 在我们的架构中，单个节点上的8个GPU只有一个IB网卡，这可能导致流水线并行（PP）期间的网络带宽争用。我们通过配置数据并行（DP）等级来解决这一问题，使同一节点上的8个GPU属于不同的DP等级，从而错开每个DP等级的PP时序。如图9(a)所示，当从64个GPU扩展到512个GPU时，训练LLaMa-13B[71]的步时间从64.118秒减少到9.717秒，实现了91%的并行效率。

items.en: We also benchmarked the training performance of our DeepSeekMoE-16B model [72] on Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC. As shown in Figure 9(b), scaling from 40 GPUs to 640 GPUs reduced the time per training step from 79.615 seconds to 6.535 seconds, achieving a parallel efficiency of 76.14%. Notably, with 320 GPUs, the step time was 10.71 seconds, resulting in a parallel efficiency of 92.92%, demonstrating excellent scalability.
items.zh: 我们还对DeepSeekMoE-16B模型[72]在Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC上的训练性能进行了基准测试。如图9(b)所示，从40个GPU扩展到640个GPU，每训练步的时间从79.615秒减少到6.535秒，实现了76.14%的并行效率。值得注意的是，在320个GPU时，步时间为10.71秒，并行效率达到92.92%，展示了出色的可扩展性。

items.en: Both HaiScale’s FSDP and PyTorch’s FSDP[18] are implementations based on the ZeRO Stage-3 algorithm[19]. The details of this implementation are already discussed in Section • ‣ II-B1.
items.zh: HaiScale的FSDP和PyTorch的FSDP[18]都是基于ZeRO Stage-3算法[19]的实现。该实现的细节已在第• ‣ II-B1节中讨论。

items.en: HaiScale’s FSDP offers better engineering implementation, optimizing memory management to reduce fragmentation specific to model adjustments. And we overlap allgather and reduce-scatter communication with forward and backward computation, split the optimization step during backward propagation for enhanced overlap. As shown in Figure 8(b), training GPT2-medium[73], we achieve 95% parallel scalability when scaling from 16 to 128 GPUs. ompared to PyTorch’s FSDP, HaiScale’s FSDP reduces training time by nearly half.
items.zh: HaiScale的FSDP提供了更好的工程实现，优化了内存管理以减少特定于模型调整的碎片。并且我们将allgather和reduce-scatter通信与前向和后向计算重叠，在后向传播期间拆分优化步骤以增强重叠。如图8(b)所示，训练GPT2-medium[73]时，从16个GPU扩展到128个GPU，我们实现了95%的并行可扩展性。与PyTorch的FSDP相比，HaiScale的FSDP将训练时间减少了近一半。

full.sec: V-C Summary
full.secZh: 五-C 总结

items.en: Our AI-HPC design meets DL requirements, and with the addition of the NVLink Bridge, it meets the training needs of early-stage LLMs, reaching the utilization upper limit of PCIe GPUs. However, due to the inherent gap between PCIe card specifications and SXM, there is a certain performance discrepancy. Considering overall performance, basic setup cost, and energy consumption, we achieved 80% performance at half the cost. We believe Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC is a successful practice in terms of cost-effectiveness.
items.zh: 我们的AI-HPC设计满足了深度学习需求，并且通过添加NVLink桥接，满足了早期LLM的训练需求，达到了PCIe GPU的利用率上限。然而，由于PCIe卡规格与SXM之间的固有差距，存在一定的性能差异。综合考虑整体性能、基本设置成本和能耗，我们以一半的成本实现了80%的性能。我们认为Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC在成本效益方面是一次成功的实践。

full.sec: VI-A Ensuring Minimal Congestion in Our Computation-Storage Integrated Network
full.secZh: 六-A 确保计算存储融合网络的最小拥塞

items.en: As previously stated, our cost-effective network integrated computation communication and storage traffics together. To achieve maximum bandwidth, it is essential to isolate interference between different types of traffic and control network congestion. In practice, we implemented the following measures:
items.zh: 如前所述，我们的成本效益网络将计算通信和存储流量整合在一起。为了实现最大带宽，必须隔离不同类型流量之间的干扰并控制网络拥塞。在实践中，我们实施了以下措施：

items.en: In typical training tasks, there are four different types of traffic: HFReduce communication, NCCL communication, 3FS storage traffic, and other traffic. By using InfiniBand’s Service Level (SL) technology[74][75], we assign different value of SL when establishing connections between nodes and map SL to IB physical queues Virtual Lanes (VLs)[74][75]. The use of Virtual Lanes ensures that flows in distinct lanes do not interfere with each other. Ultimately, we configured their proportions to implement traffic isolation, thereby preventing network congestion caused by Head-of-line (HOL) blocking [76] and different traffic collisions.
items.zh: 在典型的训练任务中，存在四种不同类型的流量：HFReduce通信、NCCL通信、3FS存储流量和其他流量。通过使用InfiniBand的服务等级（SL）技术[74][75]，我们在建立节点间连接时分配不同的SL值，并将SL映射到IB物理队列虚拟通道（VL）[74][75]。虚拟通道的使用确保了不同通道中的流不会相互干扰。最终，我们配置了它们的比例以实现流量隔离，从而防止由队头阻塞（HOL）[76]和不同流量碰撞引起的网络拥塞。

items.en: In high-throughput storage scenarios, there naturally exist many incast communication patterns, leading to certain congestion in the network. Under such circumstances, we observed that enabling adaptive routing would lead to more severe congestion spread in the network. Therefore, we opted for a static routing strategy. Based on the static routing scheme, to evenly disperse storage traffic into leaf →→\rightarrow spine links, we distribute various nodes (storage, computation, management nodes) evenly disperse storage traffic into leaf →→\rightarrow spine links.
items.zh: 在高吞吐量存储场景中，自然存在许多incast通信模式，导致网络中出现一定的拥塞。在这种情况下，我们观察到启用自适应路由会导致网络中更严重的拥塞扩散。因此，我们选择了静态路由策略。基于静态路由方案，为了将存储流量均匀分散到叶→脊链路中，我们分布各种节点（存储、计算、管理节点）以均匀分散存储流量到叶→脊链路。

items.en: We adjusted the NCCL topology to route through the IB NIC and GPUs within the same NUMA node. This adjustment reduced PCIe congestion caused by CPU chiplet interconnects. Additionally, by using PCIe Relaxed Ordering[77], we further reduced congestion and increased bandwidth.
items.zh: 我们调整了NCCL拓扑，使其通过同一NUMA节点内的IB网卡和GPU进行路由。这一调整减少了由CPU芯片间互连引起的PCIe拥塞。此外，通过使用PCIe Relaxed Ordering[77]，我们进一步减少了拥塞并增加了带宽。

items.en: 3FS implements a request-to-send control mechanism to mitigate the congestion. Details are discussed in the next subsection, Key Techinical Points of 3FS.
items.zh: 3FS实现了一种请求发送控制机制以缓解拥塞。详细内容将在下一小节“3FS的关键技术点”中讨论。

full.sec: VI-B High-Throughput Distributed File System: 3FS
full.secZh: 六-B 高吞吐分布式文件系统：3FS

items.en: 3FS is our in-house developed high performance distributed file system, akin to WekaFS[78], DAOS[79, 80], and BeeGFS[81]. However, the design and implementation of 3FS specifically focus on fully utilizing the high IOPS and throughput of NVMe SSDs and the RDMA network.
items.zh: 3FS是我们内部开发的高性能分布式文件系统，类似于WekaFS[78]、DAOS[79,80]和BeeGFS[81]。然而，3FS的设计和实现特别专注于充分利用NVMe SSD的高IOPS和吞吐量以及RDMA网络。

items.en: In Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC, we deployed 180 storage nodes, as shown in Table IV, each node contains 16 PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSDs and 2 Mellanox CX6 200Gbps InfiniBand HCAs. With totally 360 * 200Gbps outbound InfiniBand HCAs, the system can total provide 9TB/s outbound bandwidh, and we actually achieved total read throughput of 8TB/s. The total 2880 NVMe SSDs provide over 20PiB storage space with an mirror data redundancy.
items.zh: 在Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC中，我们部署了180个存储节点，如表IV所示，每个节点包含16个PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD和2个Mellanox CX6 200Gbps InfiniBand HCA。总共360个200Gbps出站InfiniBand HCA，系统可提供总计9TB/s的出站带宽，我们实际实现了8TB/s的总读取吞吐量。总共2880个NVMe SSD提供了超过20PiB的存储空间，并具有镜像数据冗余。

items.en: The 3FS system comprises four roles: cluster manager, meta service, storage service and client. Meta and storage services send heartbeats to cluster manager. All services and clients poll cluster configuration and service status from the manager. Multiple cluster managers are present, with one elected as the primary.
items.zh: 3FS系统包含四个角色：集群管理器、元数据服务、存储服务和客户端。元数据和存储服务向集群管理器发送心跳。所有服务和客户端从管理器轮询集群配置和服务状态。存在多个集群管理器，其中一个被选为主管理器。

items.en: File system meta data are stored in tables of a distributed key-value storage system. Each file or directory has a unique inode ID. The File inode/directory ID and meta data, such as file size and location information of the file content data, are stored as key-value pairs in the inode table. A separate directory entry table stores key-value pairs of (p​a​r​e​n​t​_​d​i​r​_​i​n​o​d​e​_​i​d,e​n​t​r​y​_​n​a​m​e):(e​n​t​r​y​_​i​n​o​d​e​_​i​d,…):𝑝𝑎𝑟𝑒𝑛𝑡_𝑑𝑖𝑟_𝑖𝑛𝑜𝑑𝑒_𝑖𝑑𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑟𝑦_𝑛𝑎𝑚𝑒𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑟𝑦_𝑖𝑛𝑜𝑑𝑒_𝑖𝑑…(parent\_dir\_inode\_id,entry\_name):(entry\_inode\_id,...) to support iterating entries in a directory and resolving file/directory paths. All states of meta services are persisted on the distributed key-value storage system. Several meta services run concurrently to handle meta requests from clients.
items.zh: 文件系统元数据存储在分布式键值存储系统的表中。每个文件或目录都有一个唯一的inode ID。文件inode/目录ID和元数据（如文件大小和文件内容数据的位置信息）作为键值对存储在inode表中。一个单独的目录项表存储键值对(parent_dir_inode_id, entry_name):(entry_inode_id, ...)，以支持遍历目录中的条目和解析文件/目录路径。元数据服务的所有状态都持久化在分布式键值存储系统上。多个元数据服务并发运行以处理来自客户端的元数据请求。

items.en: The storage service has an implementation of Chain Replication with Apportioned Queries (CRAQ) [82] to provide strong consistency. CRAQ’s write-all-read-any approach helps to unleash the throughput and IOPS of all SSDs. File content are split into chunks, which are replicated over a chain of storage targets. A chain table contains an ordered set of chains. The meta service selects an offset in the chain table and a stripe size k for each file. The file chunks are assigned to the next k chains starting at the offset. To distribute read/write traffic evenly to all SSDs, each SSD serves multiple storage targets from different chains. The storage service runs on every storage node and manages a few storage targets.
items.zh: 存储服务实现了带分配查询的链复制（CRAQ）[82]以提供强一致性。CRAQ的写所有读任一方法有助于释放所有SSD的吞吐量和IOPS。文件内容被分割成块，这些块在存储目标链上复制。一个链表包含一个有序的链集合。元数据服务为每个文件选择一个链表中的偏移量和条带大小k。文件块被分配给从偏移量开始的接下来k个链。为了将读/写流量均匀分布到所有SSD，每个SSD服务于来自不同链的多个存储目标。存储服务在每个存储节点上运行，并管理多个存储目标。

items.en: The storage network has a Fat-Tree topology that provides full bisection bandwidth. By design, each 3FS client can access every storage service. At peak load, incast congestion is observed on the client side. To mitigate this congestion, a request-to-send control mechanism is implemented in storage service and client [83]. After receiving a read request from a client, the service reads data from SSD and asks the client’s permission to transfer the data. The client limits the number of concurrent senders. When a storage service is granted the permission to transfer, it sends the data with a RDMA WRITE followed by a RDMA SEND to notify the client. The request-to-send control increases end-to-end IO latency but it’s required to achieve sustainable high throughput.
items.zh: 存储网络采用Fat-Tree拓扑结构，提供全对分带宽。设计上，每个3FS客户端可访问所有存储服务。在峰值负载下，客户端侧会出现incast拥塞。为缓解此拥塞，在存储服务和客户端中实现了请求发送控制机制[83]。收到客户端的读请求后，服务从SSD读取数据并请求客户端允许传输数据。客户端限制并发发送者数量。当存储服务获得传输许可时，它通过RDMA WRITE发送数据，随后通过RDMA SEND通知客户端。请求发送控制增加了端到端IO延迟，但这是实现可持续高吞吐所必需的。

items.en: 3FS-KV is a shared-storage distributed data processing system built on top of 3FS, currently supporting three models: key-value, message queue, and object storage. It supports read-write separation and on-demand startup, allowing it to fully leverage the extremely high I/O throughput provided by 3FS. 3FS-KV supports DeepSeek’s KV Context Caching on Disk technology [84], which reduces the cost of LLM serving by an order of magnitude.
items.zh: 3FS-KV是构建在3FS之上的共享存储分布式数据处理系统，目前支持三种模型：键值存储、消息队列和对象存储。它支持读写分离和按需启动，能够充分利用3FS提供的极高I/O吞吐量。3FS-KV支持DeepSeek的磁盘KV上下文缓存技术[84]，将LLM服务成本降低一个数量级。

full.sec: VI-C HAI Platform: a Time-Sharing Scheduling Platform
full.secZh: 六-C HAI平台：时分调度平台

items.en: The principle of time-sharing scheduling is applied to cluster resource management. Users submit tasks, such as running Python / bash code, starting development containers, etc., and the platform interrupts and loads tasks according to current resource requirements, cluster busyness, etc. Task code needs to follow the platform coding rules to ensure that it can be continued from breakpoints, with the specific process as follows:
items.zh: 分时调度原则应用于集群资源管理。用户提交任务，例如运行Python/bash代码、启动开发容器等，平台根据当前资源需求、集群繁忙程度等中断和加载任务。任务代码需遵循平台编码规则，确保能够从断点继续执行，具体流程如下：

items.en: Accepting the interruption signal from the cluster;
items.zh: 接受来自集群的中断信号；

items.en: Saving checkpoints (model parameters, optimizer parameters, etc.);
items.zh: 保存检查点（模型参数、优化器参数等）；

items.en: Recovering from the checkpoint and continuing to run.
items.zh: 从检查点恢复并继续运行。

items.en: The cluster deploying HAI Platform does not pool GPU resources, but classifies and marks them based on computing nodes as basic units, according to resource types, network areas, etc. The HAI Platform encourages users to fully utilize multiple GPUs simultaneously for parallel training, facilitating 99% utilization.
items.zh: 部署HAI平台的集群不池化GPU资源，而是以计算节点为基本单元，根据资源类型、网络区域等进行分类和标记。HAI平台鼓励用户同时充分利用多个GPU进行并行训练，促进99%的利用率。

full.sec: VII-A Checkpoint Manager
full.secZh: 七-A 检查点管理器

items.en: Training LLMs can span several months, during which unavoidable hardware failures may cause training interruptions. To minimize recovery time and support the HAI Platform’s interrupt and recovery operations, we developed a checkpoint manager. Additionally, the substantial size of LLM checkpoints necessitated an efficient method for saving and loading them, leveraging the high throughput of 3FS. The checkpoint manager includes the following components:
items.zh: 训练LLM可能持续数月，期间不可避免的硬件故障可能导致训练中断。为最小化恢复时间并支持HAI平台的中断和恢复操作，我们开发了检查点管理器。此外，LLM检查点规模庞大，需要利用3FS的高吞吐量实现高效的保存和加载方法。检查点管理器包含以下组件：

items.en: Parameters and optimization states are divided into chunks and written to 3FS using the 3FS batch write API, which is significantly faster than normal writes, achieving over 10 GiB/s per node. This enables saving to be completed in just a few seconds.
items.zh: 参数和优化状态被分块，并使用3FS批量写入API写入3FS，该API比普通写入快得多，每个节点超过10 GiB/s。这使得保存只需几秒钟即可完成。

items.en: Parameters and optimization states are asynchronously transferred from GPU to CPU host memory, with checkpoint saving performed periodically (typically every 5 minutes).
items.zh: 参数和优化状态从GPU异步传输到CPU主机内存，检查点保存定期执行（通常每5分钟一次）。

items.en: During the saving process, each tensor is recorded with its index and the offset within the checkpoint., which makes the location of tensors more convenient during the loading process. With the 3FS batch read API, a loading process can be completed in just a few seconds.
items.zh: 在保存过程中，每个张量都记录其索引和检查点内的偏移量，这使得加载过程中张量的定位更加方便。使用3FS批量读取API，加载过程只需几秒钟即可完成。

items.en: Thanks to the high write throughput of 3FS, periodic saving operations can be completed asynchronously in a matter of seconds, without impacting the training process. In the event of hardware failures that interrupt training, only the last 5 minutes of progress are lost. For a cluster with thousands of nodes, this overhead from disaster recovery is minimal.
items.zh: 得益于3FS的高写入吞吐量，定期保存操作可以在几秒钟内异步完成，不影响训练过程。如果硬件故障导致训练中断，仅丢失最后5分钟的进度。对于拥有数千个节点的集群，这种灾难恢复开销很小。

full.sec: VII-B Validator
full.secZh: 七-B 验证器

items.en: The best way to enhance device stability is to identify issues before they occur. Therefore, we have developed a set of validator tools to verify whether the hardware is functioning correctly. The platform’s automatic operation and maintenance system runs the validator program weekly on nodes to verify their proper functionality. It removes the faulty nodes from the scheduling platform, ensuring that all scheduled nodes are operational. Diagnosing tools like hostping[85] also integrated in our platform, but to find root cause of Hardware Failures is still hard work for operation teams. The validator mainly consists of the following parts:
items.zh: 提高设备稳定性的最佳方法是在问题发生前识别它们。因此，我们开发了一套验证工具来检查硬件是否正常运行。平台的自动运维系统每周在节点上运行验证程序，以验证其功能正常。它将故障节点从调度平台中移除，确保所有调度的节点均可运行。诊断工具如hostping[85]也集成在我们的平台中，但找到硬件故障的根本原因对运维团队来说仍然是一项艰巨的工作。验证器主要包括以下部分：

items.en: Checking hardware frequency, link speed, and link status.
items.zh: 检查硬件频率、链路速度和链路状态。

items.en: GPU Memory test: This involves checking each byte of GPU memory to ensure no data corruption has occurred.
items.zh: GPU内存测试：检查GPU内存的每个字节，确保没有数据损坏。

items.en: Running GEMM with full GPU memory occupancy, which can simultaneously check whether there are any operational logic faults in the GPU chip.
items.zh: 在GPU内存满载的情况下运行GEMM，同时检查GPU芯片是否存在运算逻辑故障。

items.en: Intra-node allreduce test: checking NVLink bandwidth through upper-level applications.
items.zh: 节点内allreduce测试：通过上层应用程序检查NVLink带宽。

items.en: Storage bandwidth stress test to make sure storage is functioning normally.
items.zh: 存储带宽压力测试，确保存储正常运行。

full.sec: VII-C Hardware Failures Characterization in Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC
full.secZh: 七-C Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC中的硬件故障特征

items.en: In supercomputers and data centers, hardware failures and chip errors can lead to floating-point overflow, non-convergence, or slow convergence during model training[86]. This paper [87] even directly points out that there is a substantial amount of Silent Data Corruption in data center processors, ultimately leading to a variety of complex issues that are difficult to replicate and locate. Indeed, in our practice, we have encountered computational errors and GPU memory errors not detected by Error Correction Code (ECC), which led to models’ gradnorm spikes, loss explosions and even non-convergence. How to tackle these hardware failures, promptly identify and categorize them, is a key issue to improve the online rate and overall utilization of cluster nodes.
items.zh: 在超级计算机和数据中心中，硬件故障和芯片错误可能导致模型训练中的浮点溢出、不收敛或收敛缓慢[86]。论文[87]甚至直接指出，数据中心处理器中存在大量静默数据损坏，最终导致各种难以复现和定位的复杂问题。确实，在我们的实践中，我们遇到了纠错码（ECC）未检测到的计算错误和GPU内存错误，导致模型梯度范数尖峰、损失爆炸甚至不收敛。如何应对这些硬件故障，及时识别和分类，是提高集群节点在线率和整体利用率的关键问题。

items.en: An Xid error[88] is a general GPU fault message that originates from the NVIDIA driver, logged into the kernel or event log of the operating system. We have categorized various types of Xid errors and analyzed the potential causes that may lead to such errors, as shown in the Table V.
items.zh: Xid错误[88]是源自NVIDIA驱动程序的通用GPU故障消息，记录到操作系统的内核或事件日志中。我们对各种类型的Xid错误进行了分类，并分析了可能导致这些错误的潜在原因，如表V所示。

items.en: Software-related errors such as Xid13, Xid31, Xid43, and Xid45 suggest possible illegal memory access or instructions in user code. Notably, illegal memory access (Xid 43) accounts for 33.48%, highlighting the need for improved memory management. However, these errors may also result from memory data corruption, so hardware faults should be considered if software bugs are ruled out.
items.zh: 诸如 Xid13、Xid31、Xid43 和 Xid45 等软件相关错误表明用户代码中可能存在非法内存访问或指令。值得注意的是，非法内存访问（Xid 43）占 33.48%，凸显了改进内存管理的必要性。然而，这些错误也可能由内存数据损坏引起，因此在排除软件缺陷后应考虑硬件故障。

items.en: Additionally, GPU Memory ECC Errors, such as Xid63, Xid64, Xid94, and Xid95, require special attention as they represent about 2% of the total. Figure 10 illustrates the statistics related to ECC errors in our production cluster over the past six months. It is evident that the number of GPU ECC faults considerably surpasses those from the CPU. Therefore, it is crucial to promptly address GPU ECC faults to ensure that application performance and accuracy remain unaffected.
items.zh: 此外，GPU 内存 ECC 错误（如 Xid63、Xid64、Xid94 和 Xid95）需要特别关注，因为它们约占总数的 2%。图 10 展示了我们生产集群过去六个月中与 ECC 错误相关的统计数据。显然，GPU ECC 故障的数量远超 CPU。因此，及时处理 GPU ECC 故障对于确保应用性能和准确性不受影响至关重要。

items.en: In addition to CPU and GPU faults, network device malfunctions represent a significant portion of hardware issues. As shown in Figure10, IB link failures account for 30% of hardware faults excluding Xid74. Network flash cuts can lead to application communication disruption, even task failures. Since most tasks run on multiple nodes, an issue on a single node can impact many others, further reducing cluster utilization. Figure 11 illustrates the IB link failures data over the past year, with raw data attached in Appendix: Supplementary Characterization, Table VIII, indicating that these issues can occur randomly throughout the cluster’s operational period.
items.zh: 除 CPU 和 GPU 故障外，网络设备故障也是硬件问题的重要组成部分。如图 10 所示，IB 链路故障占硬件故障（不包括 Xid74）的 30%。网络闪断可能导致应用通信中断，甚至任务失败。由于大多数任务在多个节点上运行，单个节点的问题可能影响许多其他节点，进一步降低集群利用率。图 11 展示了过去一年的 IB 链路故障数据，原始数据见附录：补充特征，表 VIII，表明这些问题可能在集群运行期间随机发生。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Trends of IB Network Failures: Link Flash Cuts
items.capZh: 图 11：IB 网络故障趋势：链路闪断

full.sec: VIII-A Discussion on Congestion Control in RDMA Networks
full.secZh: 八-A RDMA网络拥塞控制讨论

items.en: Lossless RDMA networks offer several flow-control mechanisms, such as Priority Flow Control (PFC)[89] for RoCE networks and credit-based flow control[90] for IB networks. In network routing, static routing algorithms in IB or ECMP (Equal-Cost Multi-Path)[91] and AR (Adaptive Routing)[92] effectively handle routing issues. However, congestion can still occur when multiple servers send data to a single receiver, potentially blocking the entire network. To mitigate this, IB NICs use DCQCN (Data Center Quantized Congestion Notification)[93] as their congestion control algorithm. While Data Processing Units (DPUs), such as the NVIDIA BF series, allow users to customize congestion control algorithms (like HPCC[94] and TIMELY RTT-based CC[95]), they increase the cost and operational complexity of the cluster.
items.zh: 无损 RDMA 网络提供了多种流量控制机制，例如 RoCE 网络的优先级流量控制（PFC）[89] 和 IB 网络的基于信用的流量控制 [90]。在网络路由中，IB 或 ECMP（等价多路径）[91] 和 AR（自适应路由）[92] 中的静态路由算法有效处理路由问题。然而，当多个服务器向单个接收方发送数据时，仍可能发生拥塞，从而阻塞整个网络。为缓解此问题，IB 网卡使用 DCQCN（数据中心量化拥塞通知）[93] 作为其拥塞控制算法。虽然数据处理单元（DPU）（如 NVIDIA BF 系列）允许用户自定义拥塞控制算法（如 HPCC [94] 和基于 TIMELY RTT 的 CC [95]），但这增加了集群的成本和运维复杂性。

items.en: In practice, we chose to disable DCQCN to avoid its shortcomings, as it could not find parameters that simultaneously support HFReduce traffic and 3FS storage traffic in our Computation-Storage Integrated Network. Instead, we employed the network tuning methods mentioned in Section VI-A, ensuring our network operates without congestion control and remains congestion-free.
items.zh: 在实践中，我们选择禁用 DCQCN 以避免其缺点，因为在我们的计算存储一体化网络中，它无法找到同时支持 HFReduce 流量和 3FS 存储流量的参数。相反，我们采用了第 VI-A 节中提到的网络调优方法，确保我们的网络在无拥塞控制的情况下运行且保持无拥塞。

full.sec: VIII-B Discussion about NVLink Technology Choices
full.secZh: 八-B NVLink技术选择讨论

items.en: Initially, we did not use NVLink to avoid extra costs and maintain stability, as HFReduce was sufficient for training requirements at that time. However, as the demand for LLMs increased, we added NVLink specifically for LLM training purposes. The decision to install NVLink should be based on actual needs due to its potential drawbacks.
items.zh: 最初，我们未使用 NVLink 以避免额外成本并保持稳定性，因为当时 HFReduce 足以满足训练需求。然而，随着对 LLM 需求的增加，我们专门为 LLM 训练添加了 NVLink。由于 NVLink 存在潜在缺点，是否安装应根据实际需求决定。

full.sec: VIII-C Maintaince Cost Overview
full.secZh: 八-C 维护成本概览

items.en: Relative hardware costs are provided in Table II and III. Software costs, contributed by several dozen in-house developers, are just a fraction of the cost for thousands of GPU servers.
items.zh: 相对硬件成本见表 II 和表 III。软件成本由数十名内部开发人员贡献，仅为数千台 GPU 服务器成本的一小部分。

items.en: The average power consumption comparision during ResNet training is provided in Table II. Including the overhead from IB switches and other nodes, the total energy consumption of the Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC does not exceed 4 MW, approximately just over 3 MW.
items.zh: ResNet 训练期间的平均功耗比较见表 II。包括 IB 交换机和其他节点的开销，Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC 的总能耗不超过 4 MW，大约略高于 3 MW。

items.en: Operating costs can be estimated by considering power consumption and rack rental costs. By multiplying this figure by the number of nodes and the PUE (Power Usage Effectiveness), the total operating costs can be calculated.
items.zh: 运营成本可通过考虑功耗和机架租赁成本来估算。将该数值乘以节点数和 PUE（电能利用效率），即可计算总运营成本。

full.sec: VIII-D Stability Compared with Other Architectures
full.secZh: 八-D 与其他架构的稳定性比较

items.en: A recent paper[96] reportsthat NVLink-related failures account for approximately 52.42% (54 out of 103) of total failures, with raw data indicating 54 NVLink Errors, 21 CUDA Errors, 16 Node Failures, 12 ECC Errors, and 12 Network Errors. In comparison, our NVLink-related issues, primarily Xid-74 Errors, as mentioned in Section VII-C1, account for about 42.57% of GPU failures.
items.zh: 最近一篇论文 [96] 报告称，与 NVLink 相关的故障约占总故障的 52.42%（103 例中的 54 例），原始数据显示 54 例 NVLink 错误、21 例 CUDA 错误、16 例节点故障、12 例 ECC 错误和 12 例网络错误。相比之下，我们的 NVLink 相关问题（主要是第 VII-C1 节提到的 Xid-74 错误）约占 GPU 故障的 42.57%。

full.sec: Future Arch and Integration with New GPU Models
full.secZh: 未来架构与新GPU模型的集成

items.en: Our next-generation PCIe architecture is designed for MoE (Mixture of Experts) LLM training, where all-to-all performance is crucial. Therefore, the next-gen nodes feature a 1:1 GPU to NIC ratio, comparable to DGX-H100/B100 systems, as illustrated in Figure 12.
items.zh: 我们的下一代 PCIe 架构专为 MoE（混合专家）LLM 训练设计，其中全对全性能至关重要。因此，下一代节点采用 1:1 的 GPU 与网卡比例，与 DGX-H100/B100 系统相当，如图 12 所示。

items.en: We are considering implementing a multi-plane network to reduce costs while maintaining performance. Additionally, we are exploring the use of RoCE switches instead of IB switches, which can significantly lower network expenses. With a 128-port 400 Gbps RoCE switch, a 4-Plane Two-Layer Fat-Trees network can support up to 32,768 GPUs.
items.zh: 我们正在考虑实施多平面网络以降低成本同时保持性能。此外，我们正在探索使用 RoCE 交换机替代 IB 交换机，这可以显著降低网络费用。使用 128 端口 400 Gbps RoCE 交换机，4 平面两层胖树网络可支持多达 32,768 个 GPU。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Next Generation PCIe Node Atchitecture with Multi-Plane Fat-Trees Network
items.capZh: 图 12：采用多平面胖树网络的下一代 PCIe 节点架构

full.sec: X Conclusions
full.secZh: 十、结论

items.en: In this paper, we have shared our experiences and insights from deploying and maintaining the Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC, which is equipped with 10,000 PCIe A100 GPUs.Our approach to PCIe architecture and storage-computation integrated network design has resulted in significant cost savings, effectively halving construction costs and demonstrating substantial cost-effectiveness.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们分享了部署和维护配备 10,000 个 PCIe A100 GPU 的 Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC 的经验和见解。我们的 PCIe 架构和存储计算一体化网络设计方法显著节省了成本，有效将建设成本减半，并展示了显著的成本效益。

items.en: In terms of software co-design, we introduced HFReduce and HaiScale to overcome hardware limitations, ensuring scalable performance of the PCIe architecture. Our in-house developed 3FS distributed file system,in conjunction with network co-design, facilitates traffic isolation for both 3FS and HFReduce allreduce traffic, effectively preventing congestion. The comprehensive software stack within the HAI Platform addresses a variety of system faults, from network congestion to hardware failures, thereby ensuring high stability and robustness.
items.zh: 在软件协同设计方面，我们引入了 HFReduce 和 HaiScale 以克服硬件限制，确保 PCIe 架构的可扩展性能。我们内部开发的 3FS 分布式文件系统与网络协同设计相结合，实现了 3FS 和 HFReduce allreduce 流量的流量隔离，有效防止拥塞。HAI 平台内的综合软件栈处理从网络拥塞到硬件故障的各种系统故障，从而确保高稳定性和鲁棒性。

items.en: Together, these software and hardware innovations enable our PCIe A100 architecture to achieve 80% the performance of NVIDIA’s DGX-A100, while consuming less than 60% of its power. The practical knowledge we have accrued may prove valuable for both industrial and academic sectors. We hope that our work will serve as a reference for others aiming to build their own cost-effective and efficient AI-HPC clusters.
items.zh: 这些软件和硬件创新共同使我们的 PCIe A100 架构实现了 NVIDIA DGX-A100 80% 的性能，同时功耗低于其 60%。我们积累的实践经验可能对工业界和学术界都有价值。我们希望我们的工作能为其他希望构建自己经济高效且高效的 AI-HPC 集群的人提供参考。

full.secZh: 致谢

Throughout the four years of design, construction, and operation, their collaborative efforts have been crucial in overcoming numerous challenges. Consequently, Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC now supports the training tasks of the DeepSeek-AI series large language models [97, 98, 99, 72, 100, 101]. We extend a special thanks to the HFAiLab System Team and the Operations Team, whose core contributions have been essential to the success of this endeavor.
items.zh: 我们衷心感谢 DeepSeek-AI 和 High-Flyer Quant 的所有同事对 Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC 项目的宝贵贡献。在四年的设计、建设和运营过程中，他们的协作努力对于克服众多挑战至关重要。因此，Fire-Flyer 2 AI-HPC 现在支持 DeepSeek-AI 系列大型语言模型 [97, 98, 99, 72, 100, 101] 的训练任务。我们特别感谢 HFAiLab 系统团队和运维团队，他们的核心贡献对于这项事业的成功至关重要。
